mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.phonenumber, u.email, ifnull(p.staff_no, '') as staff_no, ifnull(p.job_title, '') as job_title, ifnull(p.office_phone, '') as office_phone, ifnull(p.emergency_phone, '') as emergency_phone, ifnull(p.campus_name, '') as campus_name, ifnull(p.duty_name, '') as duty_name, ifnull(p.specialty, '') as specialty from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join oa_staff_profile p on u.user_id = p.user_id
mapper.select:
u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0'
and u.dept_id = #{deptId}
and exists ( select 1 from oa_contact_group g where g.group_id = #{groupId} and g.owner_id = #{ownerId} and concat(',', ifnull(g.member_ids, ''), ',') like concat('%,', cast(u.user_id as char), ',%') )
and ( u.user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.nick_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.dept_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.staff_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.job_title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.phonenumber like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by d.order_num, u.user_id desc

select d.dept_id, d.parent_id, d.dept_name, d.leader, d.phone, d.email, ifnull(e.dept_type, '') as dept_type, ifnull(e.campus_name, '') as campus_name, ifnull(e.office_location, '') as office_location, ifnull(e.service_phone, '') as service_phone from sys_dept d left join oa_department_ext e on d.dept_id = e.dept_id where d.del_flag = '0'
and ( d.dept_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.leader like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or e.campus_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by d.parent_id, d.order_num
select group_id, group_name, owner_id, member_ids, remark, create_time, update_time from oa_contact_group where owner_id = #{ownerId} order by group_id desc
